arts.ttl: Arsenal's predicted line-up vs Atalanta as Mikel Arteta faces Bukayo Saka headache
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta may be tempted to rest star players for tonight's Champions League opener with big test to come away to Manchester City on Sunday afternoon but injuries mean fringe stars must start regardless

arts.ttl: £27m Arsenal ace has just done something Mesut Ozil would be proud of as training footage emerges
arts.sum: Leandro Trossard was spotted pulling off a Mesut Ozil skill in training ahead of Arsenal vs Atalanta.

arts.ttl: How to watch Atalanta vs Arsenal: TV channel and live stream for Champions League game today
arts.sum: European campaign begins for Gunners with tough test

arts.ttl: Latest Arsenal injury news as three miss Atalanta with worrying Martin Odegaard update
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta has finally provided an update on the severity of Martin Odegaard's injury after the Gunners skipper missed Sunday's North London derby with over Tottenham. The midfielder is yet to play for Arsenal after suffering a shoulder fracture in his first training session following his move from Real Sociedad.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta can follow proven Guardiola blueprint to unleash Arsenal's Foden
arts.sum: In September 2022, he became the youngest player to ever appear in the Premier League at the age of 15 years and 181 days. Nwaneri is the player who fans are excited about the most in the academy and it only seems to be a matter of time before he becomes a regular in the team.

arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Martin Odegaard further injury blow as Mikel Arteta confirms worst fears
arts.sum: Arsenal face Atalanta in the Champions League tonight with Mikel Arteta confirming that captain Martin Odegaard has suffered a significant ankle injury, though there was a boost over Bukayo Saka

arts.ttl: Atalanta vs Arsenal: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: The Gunners head into Thursday's battle in Bergamo with bragging rights in the bag after Sunday's 1-0 away victory in the north London derby with Tottenham Hotspur. Summer signing Mateo Retegui has made a lightning fast start to life at the Gewiss Stadium, scoring four Serie A goals in as many games, and Ademola Lookman - scorer of a hat-trick in last season's Europa League final - will be searching for a first goal against Arsenal on his fifth attempt.

arts.ttl: The three secrets behind Arsenal's astonishing away form - and the one thing they still need to prove on the road
arts.sum: ISAAN KHAN IN BERGAMO: Ahead of their opening match against Atalanta tonight, Mikel Arteta's side are no longer newcomers on this stage.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola provides Kevin De Bruyne injury update ahead of Arsenal showdown
arts.sum: Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola provides an update on Kevin De Bruyne after the playmaker picks up an injury in Wednesday's Champions League clash with Inter Milan.

arts.ttl: De Bruyne gives City injury scare for Arsenal clash
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola has suggested Kevin De Bruyne is a doubt for Arsenal's visit to the Etihad Stadium on Sunday after the midfielder was forced off with an injury against Inter Milan.
